Who I am

Value Proposition

The edge you need
for cloud at scale.

I'm a Cloud Solution Architect & TAM at Huawei Latinoamérica, specialised in enterprise cloud architectures and AI-powered systems across LATAM and Asia-Pacific.

My Mechatronic Engineering background gives me a systems-thinking edge: bridging business strategy and technical execution, optimising TCO while ensuring compliance and resilience.

Track record: global AI hackathon winner to leading SAP enterprise migrations — infrastructure that truly scales.

Cloud Architecture & Migration Multi-cloud strategy, SAP migrations, hybrid deployments and disaster recovery on GCP, AWS, Azure & Huawei Cloud.
AI Systems & LLM Orchestration RAG pipelines, multi-agent frameworks, real-time voice AI and vector database integration.
TCO Optimisation & Strategy Cloud cost engineering, roadmap consulting and stakeholder management for cross-regional decisions.
Security & Compliance Network hardening, VPC design, IAM policies and regulatory compliance across LATAM & Asia-Pacific.
